title: ライアンとの戦い、始まる

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Yes, that didn't feel bad at all. If I keep this up,
the Kikuka Sho will surely...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no! My apologies. I lost my concentration for
a moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I shall pull myself together and go for another
lap!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: (I say that, but...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That makes one lap around the school exterior. I
need to finish things up—oh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ah, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You're working really hard for the Kikuka Sho.
That's great.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. It's the Classic I've had my sights set on
the most.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I see. So, you have strong feelings about the race
too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: "Too?" You must mean—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yeah, Ryan seems to be giving it her all as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I just spotted her on the track a bit ago. She was
training really hard.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Is that so.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Is Ryan still on the training track now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I only just saw her, so I think she's still
there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh... McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
No, this kind of finish isn't going to cut it! I'll get
pushed aside in the final stretch!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I have to gain enough explosive power to make
sure I break ahead at the end.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's what all this training is for! I need it to win
in the Classics!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: She certainly has incredible drive.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(The strength and talent required to dominate the
Classic races...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: (And above all else, her tremendous efforts...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(Her passion regarding the final Classic race, the
Kikuka Sho, is to be expected...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: And I'm no different.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Gasp! I-I'm sorry!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...I can't be doing this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Could I speak with you about something for a
moment?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She explains to me the source of her uneasiness.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm very sorry. A personal matter has been
distracting me from my training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, if I'm being honest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But I don't want to lose in a long-distance race,
either!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Therefore, in the Kikuka Sho, I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Good, good! I'm happy you feel that way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wha... Ryan?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to eavesdrop on your conversation. I heard
my name, so I got curious.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Besides, what you said is true.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I've reached perfect form now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So now I can compete for real, no matter who my
opponent is!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(...That's right. I've perfected my form no less
than her. And I'm no less determined either.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Your words just now have reminded me of
something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
All the hard work I've put forth and all the
hardships I've endured up to this point...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to them, our competition in the Kikuka
Sho will be in earnest!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah! That's a promise!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Kikuka Sho as their battleground, the
contest between the two Mejiro family members
begins.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...I won't let you take the lead unchallenged like I
used to.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you that I'm capable of running right
alongside you.
